message:
bench(fork_hardening): commit untracked fork-hardening benchmarks (wa-3kxe.7)

Criterion benchmarks for fork-hardening primitives:
- SPSC ring buffer capture path throughput
- Differential snapshot dirty-capture for 50-200 panes
- Telemetry instrumentation overhead
- SPSC vs std::sync::mpsc comparison

Created by CalmOwl for wa-3kxe.7 but not committed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
